title: Abarema grandiflora
taxonomy: Abarema grandiflora belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume or pea family. This plant is a species of tree in the genus Abarema. Abarema grandiflora is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a part of the subfamily Caesalpinioideae and is closely related to other species in the same genus. The classification of Abarema grandiflora reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the legume family.
uses: Abarema grandiflora is a species of flowering plant, and research on its medicinal uses is limited.
